title: jurinea rhizantha
intro: Jurinea rhizantha, also known as Rhapontic rhizantha, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae. It is primarily found in the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Jurinea rhizantha include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and it is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
